title: Nature's Battle Axe UI Icon pack
description: Ideal for RPG servers and similar projects!
body:
![rpg icons pack of nature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aee62c5cae40e01d35ac58d8f207dec590966d2_0.webp)

Are you looking to breathe more life into your RPG project? These hand-crafted icons are the perfect fit for developers creating nature-themed gear, such as forest axes, green wind blades, or druidic elemental abilities.

Whether you are building a Minecraft mod, a server plugin, or a standalone fantasy game, these assets will add a unique aesthetic to your UI. This pack is designed for creators who want to enhance their nature-based skill trees and item systems with high-quality, thematic visuals.

Key Features:

1. Nature-themed skill icons.
2. Perfect for RPG, Fantasy, and Survival projects.
3. Clean design for various UI scales.


Free for use, but credit me as the author. Need custom orders? [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/pbSQeaseRY)
